data.title: Remove dead button size variants (sm/lg/icon); rewrite DESIGN.md button section to match the real frosted default

data.body: Two parts (decisions finalized in design.md review): (1) CODE — remove the dead button size variants. Only 'default' is used; sm/lg/icon are dead. In src/components/ui/button.tsx: drop sm/lg/icon from the size cva group, simplify showCorners (currently size !== 'sm' && size !== 'icon' — corners always show now), and remove the compoundVariants that reference sm/lg. Update src/__tests__/buttons.test.tsx: it iterates ['default','sm','lg','icon'] (~lines 40-44) and calls buttonVariants({size:'sm'}) (~line 195) — adapt faithfully to the single 'default' size, do not weaken coverage. (2) DOC — rewrite the DESIGN.md button section (prose + YAML frontmatter) to match the REAL FRAC-52 frosted default: bg=var(--btn-accent), backdrop-filter blur(6px), PAPER_GRAIN_BG grain, white text, Mandelbrot corner accents, hover -> cream fill + accent-colored text. The current doc describes a stale button. Keep mono/uppercase/tracking-widest type facts. Preview not required (sm/lg/icon are unused, so zero visual change); confirm tests stay at FRAC-199 baseline.

REVIEW: PASS (cold review). Diff scope = exactly the 3 in-scope files (button.tsx, buttons.test.tsx, DESIGN.md) + plan file; one clean commit ddad52f.

CODE (button.tsx): sm/lg/icon removed from cva size group (grep '"sm"|"lg"|"icon"' -> 0 hits). compoundVariants collapsed to single size-agnostic { variant:link, class:px-0 py-0 }. showCorners reduced to variantsWithCorners.has(variant ?? default) — no dangling size refs. Stale 'small size skips' comment trimmed. Frosted default styling UNCHANGED (bg var(--btn-accent,currentColor), blur(6px), grain opacity 0.35, corner opacity 0.8, hover cream fill + accent text all intact) — only sizes removed, no restyle. No <Button size=...> consumers in src/ (the only size= hits are MandelbrotCorners' own xs/sm/md/lg prop, a different component).

TESTS: removed-size loop replaced with single default-render test; sm-padding assertion re-pointed to default (px-8/py-5) — both PASS. The 2 FRAC-199 baseline failures untouched & confirmed pre-existing: 'aria-hidden' (expected 5 got 4, grain span) + 'CTA link asChild' (stale bg-[rgba(242,234,216,0.08)] vs real bg-[var(--btn-accent,currentColor)]). Neither is size-related.

DOC (DESIGN.md): YAML button-default + prose now match the real frosted CTA verified against button.tsx actual classes (accent fill, blur(6px), white text, PAPER_GRAIN_BG grain, corners opacity 0.8, cream-fill hover). sm table row dropped; type facts (mono/uppercase/tracking-widest/px-8 py-5) preserved. No stale charcoal bg-foreground/[0.03] description remains. Corner opacity corrected 0.2 -> 0.8.

CHECKS: typecheck PASS, build PASS, conformance PASS, vitest = exactly 7 failures (FRAC-199 baseline: footer×2, navigation×1, neighborhood×2, buttons×2), 148 passed, ZERO new failures. Meets all 7 acceptance criteria. Moving to done.
